backend/main.mo: Main Motoko backend canister implementing booking management, user profile storage, and role-based access control with admin/user/guest permissions, including validation and sorted retrieval of bookings.
backend/migration.mo: Motoko migration module that upgrades old booking records to the new schema by adding default values for price, stops, luggage, and seats fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (stops, price, luxury removal, Pune route parity) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary document describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based color tokens for light and dark modes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO-optimized title and meta description for the Nashik to Pune taxi booking service, mounting the React app at the root div.
frontend/plain.html: Alternative plain HTML entry point for a non-React version of the app, loading a separate TypeScript module from the plain subdirectory.
frontend/PROJECT_FILE_MAP.txt: Comprehensive project documentation outlining the full file structure, routing architecture, frontend-backend integration points, and data flow for the Nashik-to-Pune cab booking application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that manages routing between the landing page and admin panel, handles booking state, and composes all major sections including the booking form, pricing, FAQ, and footer.
frontend/src/components/AdminBookingsPag: Admin panel page that handles Internet Identity authentication, checks admin status, supports first-time admin claim, and renders the notifications/bookings admin view once authorized.
frontend/src/components/BookingConfirmat: Displays a confirmation screen after a successful booking, showing the reference ID, trip summary, passenger details, vehicle info, and a button to start a new booking.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Multi-field booking form for selecting pickup/drop locations, date/time, car category and model, seats, luggage, and trip type, with dynamic pricing calculation and submission via a custom hook.
frontend/src/components/BookingLookup.ts: Allows users to look up existing bookings by phone number or reference ID, displaying a detailed booking card with vehicle, route, and passenger information.
frontend/src/components/FaqSection.tsx: Renders a static FAQ accordion section with eight common questions and answers about the Nashik-to-Pune cab service.
frontend/src/components/FooterContact.ts: Renders the site footer with company info, social media links (Facebook, Instagram, X), quick navigation links, and contact details including phone, email, address, and hours.
frontend/src/components/HighlightsSectio: Displays a grid of six service highlight cards (e.g., 24/7 availability, verified drivers, transparent pricing) with icons and descriptions to promote the cab service.
frontend/src/components/NotificationsAdm: Admin view component that fetches and displays all bookings in a table with columns for reference ID, passenger details, car info, price, and timestamp, with refresh and error handling.
frontend/src/components/QuickLinksSectio: Renders a row of quick-book pill buttons for common routes (e.g., Nashik→Pune, airport transfers) that trigger a callback with pre-filled pickup/drop/trip-type data.
frontend/src/components/RouteInfoSection: Displays route statistics (distance, duration, path) and lists popular pickup and drop points for both Nashik→Pune and Pune→Nashik directions in a dark-themed section.
frontend/src/components/TrustStrip.tsx: A narrow trust-signal banner showing four key selling points—verified drivers, 24/7 support, transparent pricing, and 1000+ happy customers—with icons in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/VehiclePricingSe: Shows a fleet image and two vehicle pricing cards (Sedan and SUV) with capacity, luggage, features, and approximate price ranges, highlighting the SUV as most popular.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBookingsWithIds.ts: React Query hook that fetches all bookings with their IDs sorted, skipping retry on authorization errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateBooking.ts: React Query mutation hook that creates a new booking via the backend actor and invalidates the bookings cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentPrincipalTe: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's principal as a text string, only enabled for non-anonymous identities.
frontend/src/hooks/useFindBookingByPhone: React Query mutation hook that searches for a booking by phone number, returning null if not found.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetBookingById.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single booking by its ID, returning null if not found or on error.
frontend/src/hooks/useHasAdmin.ts: React Query hook that checks whether an admin has been initialized on the backend canister.
frontend/src/hooks/useInitializeAdmin.ts: React Query mutation hook that calls the backend to initialize the admin and invalidates admin/booking-related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: React Query hook that checks whether the currently authenticated caller is an admin, returning false gracefully on authorization errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hook that fetches all bookings with IDs sorted; a simpler duplicate of useBookingsWithIds without retry logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a warm charcoal/saffron design system using CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/plain/actorClient.ts: Plain (non-React) module that creates and caches a backend actor instance, optionally using an authenticated identity from the auth client.
frontend/src/plain/admin.ts: Plain (non-React) admin panel module that manages admin authentication state, renders the admin UI, and loads bookings based on the caller's admin status.
frontend/src/plain/authClient.ts: Plain (non-React) module that wraps DFINITY's AuthClient to provide login, logout, identity retrieval, and authentication status checks.
frontend/src/plain/booking.ts: Handles the cab booking form for the plain (non-React) frontend, including rendering the form HTML, mapping car types to backend enums/prices, validating inputs, and submitting bookings via the actor client.
frontend/src/plain/main.ts: Entry point for the plain frontend that implements simple hash-based routing, rendering either the admin panel or the landing page with booking form based on the URL hash.
frontend/src/plain/sections.ts: Exports a function that returns the full landing page HTML string, including the header, hero section, and other static sections for the plain (non-React) frontend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (saffron, charcoal, semantic tokens), border radii, fonts, animations, and plugins for the frontend project.
frontend/tsconfig.node.json: TypeScript configuration for Node.js tooling (e.g., Vite config), enabling ESNext modules with bundler resolution and composite mode.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration that sets up React, environment variable injection for canister/DFX prefixes, path aliases, a dev proxy to the local ICP replica, and multi-page build outputs for index.html and plain.html.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including version, summary, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features with their IDs and requirement references for the cab booking application.
